name: K9 Flea & Tick Freshing Shampoo 355ml
description: K9 Fresh & Clean – Flea & Tick Freshing Shampoo solve the problem of pet contaminated with urine stains, grease, and difficult to remove stains and troubled by lice flea and bring the hair back to health. Benefits Antibacterial deodorant Superior ability to get rid of stains. Repels Fleas & Ticks on Dogs Ingredients Polyquaternium – 10, Tea Saponin, Pyrethrins, Piperonyl Butoxide
